_comment_scope: Coffee Brewing — player-facing strings for the runtime mini-game UI. Phase labels, result panel text, and stamp lines are all data-driven as of 2026-05-26 audit fix. See PROPOSAL_coffee_engine_followups.md.
_comment_keying: Top-level keys are the three render slots: phase_labels (PhaseLabel text per phase), phase_flavor (one-line legend below the phase, displayed during play), result_lines (ResultPanel.DetailLabel text, keyed by chapter1.coffee_buff), result_stamps (Result panel stamp impression, keyed by whether the final stamp prompt was hit or missed). The buff key 'over_caffeinated' covers both D-grade (procedural_mud) and F-grade (machine_objects) outcomes — the engine reports one buff value either way per coffee_brewing.gd::_compute_grade.

phase_flavor.grind: Grinding beans. Please avoid creating procedural dust.
phase_flavor.pour: Pour steadily. The court dislikes surprises, and so does milk.
phase_flavor.serve: Serve the cup. Try not to alarm the rubber stamp.

result_lines.procedurally_alert: Brew served out of time but accepted in the interests of justice.
result_lines.caffeinated: Caffeine level disproportionate but not fatal.

intro_instructions: Hit A or D when icons reach the line. Hold E during the pour. Press E on the final stamp.
